description: A plugin-layer web application firewall for Tiger — CrowdSec malicious-IP blocking, login/brute-force protection, rate limiting, a request WAF, and captcha challenges, all at the PHP layer with no root or daemon. Built for shared hosting.

review.notes: Public repo; module.json present + slug matches; TIGER.md present at v0.6.0-beta; BSD-3-Clause license; passes the deterministic gate (scripts/review.php). First-party WebTigers module.
